title: Hasbro Board Game Robbery in the Museum, Crime and Puzzle Game, Cooperative Family Game, Escape Room Game, Multi
features: Unique puzzle game: In this Cluedo crime & puzzle game, players join together to use their detection. escape from the museum and expose the traitor among them to solve the case. For 1 - 6 players

EXTENSIBLE PLAYBOARD: Players move their figures across the board and explore the exhibitions. Meanwhile, the board enlarges and reveals spaces and clues to solve puzzles and unlock places in the museum

COLLECT EVIDENCE: It is important to find out who committed the act and where and with what this happened. To crack the last case, evidence is ensured. The more evidence you collect, the easier it is to bring the right charge

FOR A GAME NIGHT WITH FRIENDS AND FAMILY: Here, players aged 10 and over immerse themselves in a unique gaming experience. A detective game awaits them that draws everyone into a story they will not forget. MYSTERY GAMES ARE GREAT GIFTS: Strategy and board games are great gifts for families who like to play together
International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
description: From the manufacturer Cluedo Robbery at the Museum: An Escape & Solve Mystery Game Work together to escape the museum before the guards come! Players take turns moving their pawn to explore different sections of the museum's rooms. Even if you escape, can you correctly work out who the traitor was, what they stole & where they hid it? Solve the who, what & where to win the game. Enjoy the suspense, intrigue and characters of the classic Cluedo board game, but with surprising features unique to this game. Players will be challenged with brain teasers including wordplay, numbers, riddles or good old logic. Some puzzles timed for added pressure! The video showcases the product in use.
